## Visual Quality Gate (Showcase UI changes only)

- [ ] I completed `docs/design/visual-quality-scorecard.md`
- [ ] My score is **>= 85/100**
- [ ] I attached screenshots for:
  - [ ] Home (terminal active)
  - [ ] Home (terminal minimized/hidden)
  - [ ] Projects gallery
- [ ] Terminal-first identity is preserved
- [ ] `prefers-reduced-motion` fallback is verified
- [ ] Keyboard focus visibility is verified
